definition: The hidden="until-found" attribute value that hides content while keeping it discoverable by in-page find (Ctrl+F), scroll-to-text, and anchor navigation — which auto-reveal the content and fire a beforematch event.
usage: Resolved native-first via the capabilityMatrix as the find-in-page substrate for collapsed disclosure / accordion content; a scripted reveal-on-find shim is the fallback.
